type.description: The type of the output item.

id.description: The unique ID of the output item.

role.description: The role of the output item.

status.description: The status of the output item.

content.description:
The content of the output message. Present when type
is message.

name.description:
The name of the function being called. Present when type
is function_call.

call_id.description:
The unique ID of the function call. Present when type is
function_call.

arguments.description:
The arguments to the function call in JSON format. Present
when type is function_call.

summary.description:
A summary of the reasoning performed by the model. Present
when type is reasoning.
